name: American Legion Scholarships
amount: Varies; Oratorical Scholarship up to $25,000; Baseball Scholarship up to $5,000; Samsung Scholarship $10,000

eligibility.other_requirements: Must be descendant of veteran; or participate in American Legion programs (Boys State/Girls State, Baseball, Oratorical Contest); Samsung scholarship requires Korean War era veteran descendant

stackable_notes: External awards; generally stackable. No institutional displacement expected.
notes: Multiple distinct scholarship programs under one umbrella. The Oratorical Contest is competition-based (state then national rounds). Samsung American Legion Scholarship is for Boys State/Girls State attendees. Each has separate eligibility — advisor should clarify which apply.
